channel.title: GitHub GDScript Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of GDScript in GitHub

item.title: GDQuest/godot-demos
item.description: Dozens of free and open source demos for the Godot game engine

item.title: Orama-Interactive/Pixelorama
item.description: A free & open-source 2D sprite editor, made with the Godot Engine! Available on Windows, Linux, macOS and the Web!

item.title: coppolaemilio/dialogic
item.description: 💬 Create dialogs, characters and scenes to display conversations in your Godot games.

item.title: uheartbeast/youtube-tutorials
item.description: A repository for holding all the source code to my YouTube tutorial videos.
